title: Diasperus stocksii

This family is commonly known as the sesame family, and it includes around 14 genera and 60 species. Diasperus stocksii is part of the genus Diasperus, which consists of several species of flowering plants. The plant is native to India and is often found in dry and rocky areas. The classification of Diasperus stocksii reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Pedaliaceae family.
